Thanks for contributing! Please fill out the sections below so reviewers

directly to this repo.

## What does this PR do?

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. Link to an issue if there is one (e.g. "Closes #42"). -->

## How was it tested?

<!-- For code changes: describe what you ran on what speaker / firmware.
     For doc changes: describe how you verified the steps work as written.
     For helper-script changes: describe the manual run you did. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal data in the diff (IPs, MAC addresses, real station IDs
      I use, my router brand, etc.) — placeholders only.
- [ ] Updated relevant docs in `docs/` if behaviour or setup changed.
- [ ] Added a CHANGELOG entry under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible.
- [ ] If this changes how the speaker is contacted or how files are
      pushed to it, I tested it on my own speaker.
